home.heroSubtitle: Stop scrolling through random profiles. Start with babysitters your friends actually use. Local, reviewed, and easy to book.
home.heroBody2: Start with babysitters your friends actually use.
home.heroBody3: Local, reviewed, and easy to book in one place.
home.seoIntro: Berlin Babysitter connects parents across Berlin with sitters they can genuinely trust — recommended by real families right in your neighborhood.|Find available Kita spots nearby, explore sitter profiles with honest reviews, and connect with other parents for playdates or shared childcare.|Whether you just moved to Berlin or need a last-minute sitter for tonight — find the right care quickly, no guesswork needed.
home.trustedBody: Families in Prenzlauer Berg, Kreuzberg, Mitte, Friedrichshain, and Charlottenburg already use Berlin Babysitter to find childcare they can rely on. From English-speaking sitters in Mitte to experienced nannies in Schoeneberg, our platform connects you with caregivers your neighbors trust.
home.parentDescription: Browse profiles, read reviews, book the right person.
home.sitterDescription: Create your profile, set your rates, connect with families.
home.howItWorksTitle: Everything parents in Berlin need — in one place.
home.kitaDesc: Browse daycare openings across Berlin neighborhoods. Filter by district, check availability, and reach out to Kitas directly — all from one place.
home.babysitterDesc: Every sitter on our platform lives in Berlin and is recommended by real Berlin parents. Read honest reviews, browse local profiles, and book someone your neighbors already trust.
home.momsDesc: Parenting in Berlin is better together. Connect with other families in your Kiez for playdates, co-sitting arrangements, or just someone who gets it.
home.faq1Q: Is Berlin Babysitter free to use?
home.faq1A: Yes, creating an account and browsing babysitter profiles is completely free for parents. Babysitters set their own hourly rates, which you can see on their profiles before booking.
home.faq2Q: Who are the sitters on Berlin Babysitter?
home.faq2A: Every sitter on our platform is based in Berlin. They set their own rates, choose their availability, and build their profile with real photos and a personal bio. Reviews come from parents who have booked through the platform, so you can make an informed choice before reaching out.
home.faq3Q: What Berlin neighborhoods do you cover?
home.faq3A: We cover all major Berlin districts including Prenzlauer Berg, Kreuzberg, Mitte, Friedrichshain, Charlottenburg, Neukölln, Schöneberg, Wedding, Steglitz, and Moabit. You can also filter babysitters by the language they speak.
home.faq4A: Sitters set their own rates. Most charge between €12–€18 per hour depending on experience, number of children, and the type of care needed. You can see each sitter's rate on their profile before reaching out.
home.faq5Q: How do I book a babysitter?
home.faq5A: Create a free account, browse sitter profiles in your area, and send a booking request with your preferred date and time. The babysitter can then accept, and you can message each other to finalize details.

coloringPages.iphoneHint: On iPhone: long-press the image to save
coloringPages.tip1Desc: Use thicker paper (120gsm or more) so crayons and markers don't bleed through.
coloringPages.tip2Desc: Click the print button, then select 'Fit to page' in your printer settings for the best results.
coloringPages.tip3Desc: There are no wrong colors. A purple dinosaur? A rainbow rocket? Let creativity flow.
